changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md for devstral-small: (1) Added CRITICAL directive to always write and execute a Python script instead of computing manually, (2) Condensed verbose explanations into concise tables and code, (3) Provided a complete copy-paste Python script template with csv module (no pandas dependency), (4) Emphasized using EXACT output filenames from the task prompt, (5) Simplified quality report section with clear field names
